usefulness_evaluation.narrative: All 11 status machine tests passed. PR #198 sentinel errors are correctly mapped: COMPLETED->PLANNING/ACTIVE returns failed_precondition (not internal), CreateTrip with COMPLETED returns invalid_argument. PR #197 create-with-ACTIVE feature also verified working. Phase 4 regression guards (not_found for missing UUID, invalid_argument for bad UUID) match Run 5 baseline.

test6_completed_to_planning.message: invalid trip status transition: completed → planning

test7_completed_to_active.message: invalid trip status transition: completed → active

test8_completed_to_planning_trip2.message: invalid trip status transition: completed → planning

test11_invalid_uuid.message: validation error: id: value must be a valid UUID
